// frontend/src/App.js - Complete with Image Banner import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import './App.css'; function App() { const [jobs, setJobs] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const loadJobs = async () => { setLoading(true); try { const response = await fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/jobs'); const data = await response.json(); if (data.success) { setJobs(data.data.slice(0, 6)); } } catch (error) { console.error('Error loading jobs:', error); } setLoading(false); }; useEffect(() => { loadJobs(); }, []); const categories = [ { name: 'Cleaning', icon: '🧹', jobs: '120+', color: '#FFF1E6' }, { name: 'Gardening', icon: '🌿', jobs: '85+', color: '#FFE4D6' }, { name: 'Moving', icon: '📦', jobs: '64+', color: '#FFD8B1' }, { name: 'Handyman', icon: '🔧', jobs: '156+', color: '#FFCC99' }, { name: 'Delivery', icon: '🚚', jobs: '203+', color: '#FFC085' }, { name: 'Painting', icon: '🎨', jobs: '47+', color: '#FFB56B' } ]; const stats = [ { value: '5,000+', label: 'Workers' }, { value: '10,000+', label: 'Jobs Done' } ]; return (
